回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	112學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 英文寫作(二) (English Writing II)	開課班級 : 應英一	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 羅主恩	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
Course Description: This course cultivates students’ writing ability by promoting their knowledge of the genres particular to English academic writing. A strong emphasis is based on heightening students’ awareness of genre conventions by having students read in abundance and then write meaningful paragraphs and essays. The first semester focuses on paragraphs and second semester focuses on both paragraphs and essays. 


2.教學綱要
Course Objectives: Students will build and develop writing skills by:
1. Analyzing and applying the steps of the writing process;
2. Examining the purpose for, and the steps in writing different types of essays;
3. Pointing out the importance of grammar, with successful application of skills and principles.
4. Applying editing techniques to personal and selected writings.
 


3.教科書
2	書名 : College writing skills with Readings. (10th Ed.).　
出版日期 : 2010年 月 
作者 : Langan, J.　出版社 : 　版本 : (10th Ed.).

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Requirements: 1. You must buy a textbook and write your name and student number in the front page. 2. Check your email very often, ESPECIALLY before Midterm and Final exams 3. All assignments are due on the due date. Late assignments will NOT be accepted. 4. There will be no make-up quizzes or tests unless you have a valid excuse from the school. 5. Anyone who plays with a cell phone or pocket video game during class time will lose 5 points from his or her Final Exam grade.  
Attendance: One class or 2 hours of absence will be permitted without penalty; 2 points will be subtracted from your FINAL GRADE for every additional hour of absence. If you are more than 10 minutes late, you are counted as absent for that hour. If your unexcused absences are more than 5 days (or 10 hours) you Fail the class. 
Evaluation: Mid-term examination = 45% Final examination = 45% Participation = 10% (Attendance; handouts & quizzes, class participation, etc.)
